title: Noah Lucas homepage v027 first-frame and contrast staging experiment
changeSummary: Moves the primary pane into the first viewport while preserving the untinted Yosemite image layer.
Strengthens identity hierarchy and increases the readability and touch size of display controls.
Adds explicit high-contrast day and night glass treatments across desktop and mobile.
Adds noindex, nofollow, and noarchive metadata for the staging-only surface.
Adds restrained CTA lift and focus behavior with reduced-motion fallback.

validation.method: Local HTTP server plus in-app browser at 1440x1000 and 390x844.
checks: Desktop first viewport shows the untinted image, identity, employer proof, and product thesis with readable contrast.
Mobile first viewport shows the same hierarchy without horizontal overflow.
Day and night theme controls both update their accessible label and visible treatment.
Staging HTML remains semantically navigable and preserves all existing links, media controls, and impact disclosures.
